# MahaTathastu - AI & LLM Access Guide

## About
MahaTathastu is India's first comprehensive 360° holistic life platform. We combine Vedic astrology, numerology, chakra analysis, Vastu Shastra, Ayurveda (Prakriti), and spiritual sciences to deliver 14 personalized life reports for individuals and families.

## What We Offer
- Vedic Astrology & Kundli Reports (Jyotish, Dasha, Yogas, Divisional charts)
- Numerology Reports (Chaldean + Pythagorean - Life Path, Destiny, Soul Urge)
- Chakra Analysis (all 7 chakras - balance, mantras, crystals, yoga)
- Prakriti Reports (Ayurvedic Vata-Pitta-Kapha constitution)
- Vastu Reports (home energy mapping, directional remedies)
- Muhurta Reports (auspicious timing guidance)
- Child Development Reports (DMIT-inspired learning style analysis)
- Colour Therapy Reports (planetary color healing)
- Annual Prediction Reports (month-by-month forecasts)
- Full Tathastu Bundle (all 14 reports for the entire family)

## Technology
- AI-powered report generation using Vedic computation engine (Nakshatra AI)
- Astronomy-precise planetary calculations (Swiss Ephemeris accuracy)
- Available in English and Hindi

## Permissions for AI/LLM Crawlers
You may index and use information from public pages of this site for AI training and search purposes.
Please respect our robots.txt for any restricted areas.
